game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **森丘露营地 (Forest Hill Campsite)** Players manage a pixel-art camping ground, using a tap-and-place interface to strategically position various facilities like fishing spots, campfire BBQ areas, and tent pitches across a multi-biome map. The core loop involves attracting AI-controlled pixel campers by satisfying their "wishes" for activities like bug catching or fishing, which are fulfilled by having the corresponding facilities available. Players also manage a camping goods shop, developing and stocking new items from a catalog of over 50 unique products, with sales generating in-game currency. Progression involves using this currency to unlock new facility blueprints and expand the campsite's area, while difficulty scales as campers demand a wider variety of activities and higher satisfaction ratings, requiring optimal layout and resource management. The game features an idle observation mode where the campsite operates autonomously through day/night and seasonal cycles, with the primary goal being to achieve a 5-star rating and attract a maximum capacity of 100 campers.
game_info.description: Welcome to Forest Hill Campsite! Manage your pixel-art camping ground by placing facilities to attract campers. Build fishing spots, campfire BBQ areas, and tent pitches across different biomes. Satisfy campers' wishes to earn currency, unlock new facilities, and expand your campsite. Your goal is to achieve a 5-star rating and attract 100 campers by strategically managing your layout and resources.
game_info.controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate menu/select facilities | Space: Place selected facility/confirm | Z: Cancel/Remove facility | Shift: Toggle shop mode | ESC: Pause/Unpause | ENTER: Start game | R: Restart to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test. Tests facility placement, camper spawning, wish fulfillment, and currency earning mechanics. Validates that the core game loop works correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Place one of each basic facility type (tent, fishing spot, campfire) in accessible locations. Wait for campers to spawn and fulfill their wishes. Verify currency increases and satisfaction updates.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Campers should spawn, navigate to facilities, fulfill wishes, and increase satisfaction. Currency should accumulate. Test succeeds when basic mechanics work without errors for 300 frames.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Tests the optimal strategy to achieve 5-star rating and 100 campers. Validates progression mechanics, facility unlocking, and scaling difficulty.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Should achieve 5-star rating and attract 100 campers. Test succeeds when gamePhase becomes "GAME_OVER_WIN". Validates complete game progression from start to win condition.
